message:
fix: address code review issues in buffer pooling

- Reorder imports to gofmt canonical order (stdlib first, then external)
- Remove redundant `if w != sourceID` check (already handled by continue)
- Add explicit blank identifier for unused edgeCount parameter
- Add E2E test log files to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,3 +39,6 @@ pkg/ui/.beads/
 # Large benchmark test data (generated)
 tests/testdata/benchmark/
 *.prof
+
+# E2E test logs
+test_results_e2e_*.log
